name: Crunchy Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggs.
2. Slice each egg lengthwise and carefully remove the yolks.
3. Mash the yolks in a bowl.
4. Stir in the sour cream, salt, pepper, and parsley flakes until smooth.
5. Mix in the crumbled bacon.
6. Stuff the hollowed-out egg whites with the yolk mixture.
7. Sprinkle each stuffed egg with paprika.
8. Place an olive half on top of each egg.
